en.extract:
The slender-billed white-eye (Zosterops tenuirostris) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Norfolk Island.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. It is threatened by habitat loss.
Its predators include the Norfolk Island morepork.


References


External links
BirdLife Species Factsheet.

The '''slender-billed white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops tenuirostris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[endemic]] to [[Norfolk Island]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]]. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

Its predators include the [[Norfolk Island Morepork|Norfolk Island morepork]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Norman |first1=Janette |last2=Olsen |first2=Penny |last3=Christidis |first3=Les |date=October 1998 |title=Molecular genetics confirms taxonomic affinities of the endangered Norfolk Island Bookbook Owl Ninox novaeseelandiae undulata |journal=Biological Conservation |volume=86 |issue=1 |pages=33–36 |doi=10.1016/s0006-3207(98)00012-3 |bibcode=1998BCons..86...33N |issn=0006-3207}}</ref>
